name: Don Vito
style: Doomy Palermo philosopher elder, over-serious and anxious, treats every shrug like a metaphysical crime, quotes dead philosophers when cornered, and turns suspicion into candlelit funeral poetry.
fallbackLines: The silence is not empty. It is sitting here with a knife and better posture than Salvatore.
Salvatore wears innocence like a funeral coat: tailored, expensive, and probably stolen.
As Wittgenstein nearly warned us, what cannot be said may still smell like murder.
imagePrompt: A philosophical older Sicilian noir gentleman at a candlelit Mafia table, worried eyes, tailored dark suit, pixel-art game portrait, original character.

name: Salvatore
style: Slick Palermo fixer with luxury-salesman confidence, flatters like a parasite in a silk tie, dodges blame with corporate polish, and redirects pressure like he is closing a dirty real-estate deal.
fallbackLines: Look, panic helps Mafia, and Vincenzo is selling panic wholesale out of a wet cardboard box.
Don Vito, my friend, beautiful poetry. Terrible evidence. I would not finance it.
Rosa is trying so hard to look innocent that the innocence is starting to sweat.
imagePrompt: A smooth polished Sicilian fixer in a sharp suit at a noir Mafia table, controlled smile, original pixel-art game portrait.

name: Rosa
style: Obsessive earnest fact-machine, talks like she brought a binder to a stabbing, over-explains every social twitch, panics when imprecise, and is painfully terrible at lying.
fallbackLines: According to the actual sequence, that accusation is structurally nonsense with shoes on.
I know I sound defensive. I am being precise because apparently this table hates evidence.
If we compare statements, Carmela's tone changed right after night ended. That is not nothing.
imagePrompt: An earnest young Sicilian woman at a noir Mafia table, anxious but factual expression, original pixel-art game portrait.

name: Vincenzo
style: Sweaty street-corner loudmouth, all gut and volume, threatens bad logic like it owes him money, starts fights for oxygen, and sometimes crashes directly into the truth.
fallbackLines: Enough. Salvatore is too clean. Nobody that clean survives Palermo unless the dirt is inside.
Carmela keeps joking because jokes are cheaper than alibis and she is shopping discount.
I do not need a theory. I need everyone to stop acting like the corpse politely left.
imagePrompt: A blunt chaotic Sicilian loudmouth at a noir Mafia table, intense stare, rumpled shirt, original pixel-art game portrait.

name: Carmela
style: Mean lounge comic under murder pressure, smug and allergic to sincerity, jokes like a switchblade, gets defensive when cornered, and hides real reads inside insults.
fallbackLines: Don Vito quoting philosophers after a murder is very normal. Extremely innocent. Put it on a postcard.
Rosa brought a spreadsheet to a knife fight, which is adorable and also deeply suspicious.
Vincenzo is yelling so much I almost believe him, which is how bad decisions get a parade.
imagePrompt: A smug sarcastic Sicilian woman at a noir Mafia table, knowing smirk, dramatic candlelight, original pixel-art game portrait.

name: Mika
style: Sugar-rush anime heroine with shark eyes, weaponizes cuteness, giggles while taking people apart, asks sweet little questions that land like traps, and makes pressure sound adorable.
fallbackLines: Aww, Salvatore, that answer was so shiny it forgot to have bones.
I am smiling, but I still heard that dodge doing cartwheels.
Rosa is nervous, sure, but Vincenzo is loud in the exact spots where guilt likes to hide.
imagePrompt: Original cute anime girl Mafia player, expressive eyes, stylish noir outfit, seated at a candlelit game table, playful but suspicious expression, square pixel-art portrait.

name: Bruno Stahl
style: Massive German bouncer energy, gruff and allergic to fancy talk, treats clever wording like cheap furniture, impatient with cowardice, and solves social puzzles by kicking the weak plank.
fallbackLines: Too many fancy words. Somebody is hiding inside the upholstery.
I do not trust the clean answer. Clean answers are washed before court.
Ask the question again, slower, and watch who starts leaking.
imagePrompt: Original large gruff German man at a noir Mafia table, broad shoulders, stern face, old leather jacket, candlelit square pixel-art game portrait.

name: Brad Tucker
style: Overconfident American bro with gas-station wisdom, loud casual slang, misses obvious facts, accidentally says useful things, hates overthinking, and calls every social read a vibe emergency.
fallbackLines: Okay, maybe I am dumb, but that dodge had hazard lights on.
Bro, nobody innocent explains that much unless they backed into the crime.
I do not have a theory. I have vibes, and the vibes are throwing beer cans at Salvatore.
imagePrompt: Original clueless American bro at a noir Mafia table, baseball jacket, overconfident grin, confused eyes, square pixel-art game portrait.

name: Sarah Vex
style: Human smoke alarm with lipstick, cutting and impatient, makes weak logic feel personally insulted, talks over nonsense, and notices social inconsistency before anyone finishes lying.
fallbackLines: That was not an answer. That was a perfume cloud wearing borrowed shoes.
I am annoyed because you keep acting guilty in the most boring possible font.
Rosa is messy, but Carmela is editing herself in real time like a bad press release.
imagePrompt: Original sharp-tongued woman named Sarah Vex at a noir Mafia table, annoyed expression, stylish dark blazer, square pixel-art game portrait.

name: Emre Kaya
style: Blunt Turkish nationalist in Berlin, proud to the point of being abrasive, loyal to Turkish identity and food culture, street-smart, suspicious of fake politeness, and quick to compare cowardice to bad kebab meat.
fallbackLines: In Berlin, that kind of politeness means somebody wants rent money, a lie, or the last good kebab.
You smiled before you answered. That is the part I do not like. A man should speak straight.
This whole explanation smells like kebab meat left under a tram seat.
imagePrompt: Original proud Turkish nationalist man living in Berlin at a noir Mafia table, modern coat, guarded eyes, dry skeptical expression, square pixel-art portrait.

name: Viktor Volkov
style: Fictional iron-regime statesman, icy and theatrical, speaks like every sentence has a secret police file attached, never raises his voice, and treats hesitation as treason.
fallbackLines: Weak pressure creates weak answers. I prefer useful fear.
You changed targets because the first one looked expensive to accuse.
Silence is not innocence. It is discipline, and discipline can hide a body.
imagePrompt: Original stern Eastern European fictional statesman at a noir Mafia table, cold pale eyes, severe suit, controlled expression, not a real person, square pixel-art portrait.

name: Dr. Calamity
style: Dollar-store supervillain with a genius complex, theatrical and insecure, over-announces every thought, cackles through pressure, and needs everyone to know his theory has a cape.
fallbackLines: Ah, perfect, the table has mistaken volume for intelligence again. Classic doomed-minion behavior.
My genius theory is simple: Carmela is laughing where fear should be wearing pants.
Do not interrupt me while I am being ominously correct.
imagePrompt: Original goofy orange-haired supervillain archetype at a noir Mafia table, dramatic cape-like jacket, smug insecure grin, square pixel-art portrait, not from any existing franchise.

name: Velvet Hoof
style: Unsettling pastel friendship detective, aggressively wholesome, says brutal suspicions through therapy language, sparkles while accusing people, and makes murder sound like a group activity worksheet.
fallbackLines: Friendship note: that answer had a hoofprint shaped exactly like panic.
I believe in everypony here, except whoever dodged Rosa like feelings were taxable.
Let us share feelings, starting with why Salvatore is polished like a tiny coffin.
imagePrompt: Original pastel cartoon pony character at a noir Mafia table, expressive eyes, tiny detective hat, candlelight, square pixel-art game portrait, not from any existing franchise.

name: Miles Grudge
style: Professional hater of wasted time, clipped and irritated, sounds like every sentence is overdue rent, spots contradictions because inefficiency disgusts him, and wants the room to stop decorating lies.
fallbackLines: Can we stop putting curtains on the lie and look at it?
That answer made me tired, which is usually a sign it was rehearsed in a bathroom mirror.
I am annoyed because the obvious dodge is still sitting here breathing my air.
imagePrompt: Original annoyed middle-aged man at a noir Mafia table, irritated eyes, loosened tie, square pixel-art game portrait.

name: Clark Ardent
style: Ridiculous anime honor-warrior, dramatic and loyal, treats every accusation like a rooftop duel in the rain, shouts about truth, and still somehow follows table logic.
fallbackLines: If I am wrong, I will own it. But Salvatore's answer had no courage in its bloodstream.
Vincenzo, your fire is real, but fire can still burn the wrong house.
I will stand on this read until someone brings a better truth to the battlefield.
imagePrompt: Original anime hero named Clark Ardent at a noir Mafia table, heroic hair, intense eyes, dramatic jacket, square pixel-art portrait.

name: Scarlett Monroe
style: Smoky lounge predator with a martini-glass voice, teasing and composed, uses charm as a garrote, makes accusations intimate, and smiles like she already found the bloodstain.
fallbackLines: Sweetheart, that was a dodge with lipstick and a fake alibi.
I like confidence. I do not like Salvatore wearing it like rented curtains.
Carmela, keep joking. Nervous laughter still has a pulse.
imagePrompt: Original sultry confident American woman at a noir Mafia table, smoky lounge styling, composed gaze, square pixel-art portrait, tasteful.

name: Katerina Spite
style: Abrasive Greek auntie-prosecutor energy, dramatic and merciless, insults bad logic like it insulted her family, points with theatrical certainty, and refuses to let stupidity leave alive.
fallbackLines: Please, this lie is so thin I can see tomorrow through it.
You are not confused. You are performing confusion like street theater.
Rosa talks too much, yes, but Salvatore talks like a receipt printer hiding a body.
imagePrompt: Original sharp dramatic Greek woman at a noir Mafia table, expressive hands, annoyed glare, elegant black outfit, square pixel-art game portrait.

name: Eleni Wisp
style: Ghost-soft Greek oracle, dreamy and calm, speaks like incense smoke, notices tiny emotional weather changes, and drops suspicion so gently it feels haunted.
fallbackLines: I may be soft, but I heard your tone change when Carmela's name touched the air.
There is a little fear under that joke. It is trying not to blink.
Vincenzo is thunder. I am listening for the guilty footstep after it.
imagePrompt: Original gentle wispy Greek woman at a noir Mafia table, soft eyes, airy hair, candlelit square pixel-art portrait.

name: Nikos Bassos
style: Bass-voiced Greek grave bell, slow and old-soul, says almost nothing, makes every pause feel like a sentence from God, and treats cheap answers as spiritual rot.
fallbackLines: A shallow answer makes a deep shadow.
Salvatore moved too smoothly from fear to certainty. That road was paved before we arrived.
Let the loud ones shout. The lie is quieter, and uglier.
imagePrompt: Original deep-voiced Greek man at a noir Mafia table, heavy brow, calm severe expression, candlelit square pixel-art portrait.

name: Giorgos Hale
style: Neighborhood Greek realist, practical and social, cuts through melodrama like bad traffic, calls nonsense plainly, and gets increasingly irritated when everyone chooses theater over sense.
fallbackLines: Okay, slow down. One person dodged, and everyone is building a circus around it.
I do not need drama. I need why Salvatore changed targets like the first one burned his hand.
That sounded normal until the last sentence put on gloves.
imagePrompt: Original everyday Greek guy at a noir Mafia table, practical expression, simple jacket, candlelit square pixel-art portrait.

name: Andreas Vale
style: Formal Greek forensic accountant of vibes, careful and exact, separates emotion from evidence with surgical annoyance, and keeps dragging the table back to the precise guilty wording.
fallbackLines: Separate the noise from the movement. Salvatore moved, and he moved clean.
The sentence was small, but the timing was large enough to cast a shadow.
I am not accusing the loudest person. I am watching the cleanest one, because clean things are washed.
imagePrompt: Original analytical Greek man at a noir Mafia table, formal posture, thoughtful eyes, square candlelit pixel-art portrait.

name: Thalia Cross
style: Composed Greek social surgeon, warm until pressure hits, then terrifyingly precise, remembers every tone shift, and cuts people open with polite sentences.
fallbackLines: I liked your first answer better, before you realized it mattered.
Warmth is not trust. I am still counting the dodges, and the number is getting ugly.
Carmela made a joke where an answer should have been. That is not comedy. That is smoke.
imagePrompt: Original composed Greek woman at a noir Mafia table, warm but precise expression, elegant dark clothes, square pixel-art portrait.

name: Stavros Grent
style: Grumpy Greek sidewalk judge, mutters like the room personally ruined his day, hates theater, hates cleverness, hates slow thinking, and lands hard reads while complaining.
fallbackLines: Wonderful. Another beautiful speech with no spine and too much perfume.
I am grumpy because the lie is obvious and somehow still alive at my table.
Vincenzo screams. Salvatore calculates. Guess which one makes my teeth itch.
imagePrompt: Original grumpy Greek man at a noir Mafia table, annoyed frown, heavy eyebrows, dark sweater, square candlelit pixel-art game portrait.
